headlines.headline: Is Wemby the most impactful player in the NBA?
headlines.description: Vincent Goodwill and Chris Canty marvel at Victor Wembanyama's fast rise in the NBA.

headlines.headline: 'The Hoop Collective': Episodes of Brian Windhorst's NBA podcast
headlines.description: From breaking news to the latest intel from around the NBA, here are the biggest highlights from Brian Windhorst's "The Hoop Collective" podcast.

headlines.headline: Tim MacMahon: Luka is prioritizing whining over winning
headlines.description: Tim MacMahon vents his frustration about Luka Doncic getting his 15th technical foul of the season.

headlines.headline: Kristaps Porzingis' 'mysterious' illness and the Warriors' uncertain future
headlines.description: The Warriors traded for Porzingis on Feb. 4. He made his debut on Feb. 19 and has not played since.

headlines.headline: Lakers' Ayton exits with knee injury; LeBron says elbow sore
headlines.description: Deandre Ayton left Thursday night's loss to the Nuggets with a knee injury, while LeBron James complained of a sore elbow afterward and said he wasn't sure of his status for Friday's game against the Pacers.

headlines.headline: Oklahoma City looks for 50th win this season in matchup with Golden State
headlines.description: Golden State Warriors (32-30, eighth in the Western Conference) vs. Oklahoma City Thunder (49-15, first in the Western Conference)

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL free agency updates: Signings, trades, rumors
headlines.description: NFL free agency opens with the legal negotiating window on March 9. Here's the latest intel.

headlines.headline: Chargers reach deal with C Tyler Biadasz, source says
headlines.description: The Chargers and free agent center Tyler Biadasz have agreed to a deal, a source told ESPN. Biadasz will replace Bradley Bozeman, who retired last week.

headlines.headline: Sources: Browns rework Watson contract to lower NFL-high cap hit
headlines.description: The Browns have once again restructured the contract of quarterback Deshaun Watson, league sources confirmed to ESPN, a move that frees close to $36 million in cap space and lowers what was the largest cap hit in the NFL in 2026.

headlines.headline: Super Bowl LXI odds: All 32 teams' odds to win the championship
headlines.description: Every NFL team's team's win total, as well as odds to win their division, the conference and Super Bowl LXI.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL free agency: Ranking the top 100 players available
headlines.description: Could Kenneth Walker III, Trey Hendrickson, Jauan Jennings and Malik Willis get a lot of interest from teams? Let's stack the best NFL free agents.

headlines.headline: What could Bears do with cap space from DJ Moore trade?
headlines.description: The "Get Up" crew discusses what the Bears could do with the cap space they cleared from trading DJ Moore.
